title: 3 Pack Large Silicone Spatula for Kitchen,600°F Heat Resistant Rubber Spatulas for Baking,Cooking, Scraping,and Mixing,Non Stick Kitchen Utensils, BPA Free, 11.2 in, Black
features: HEAT-RESISTANT 600°F PRO-GRADE SILICONE- Our spatulas are one piece construction with a solid stainless steel core and wrapped in non-slip BPA Free Pro Grade Silicone that is heat-resistant up to 600°. You can step away from the stove knowing your spatula won’t melt and will withstand the high temp.

ERGONOMICAL DESIGN - The smooth, flexible, and thin edges make our spatulas easy to scrape, flip, or mix your ingredients and are safe on all cookware. Any home chef will feel like a seasoned pro cooking in the kitchen.

STRONG, NON-TOXIC and FADE RESISTANT - Every component has been designed with safety, durability and your family in mind. Our solid core construction provides a heavier, stiffer feel that won’t bend or break for years of use. Wrapped in BPA free pro grade silicone means our spatulas are non-toxic, lead free, and odourless and won’t release harmful chemicals during cooking unlike typical nylon or rubber spatulas.

HASSLE-FREE CLEANING and DISHWASHER SAFE - With no seams, cracks or removable parts, our one-piece seamless non-stick design ensures that your silicone spatulas won’t trap any food particles, making cleaning effortless. Throw them in the dishwasher or wash them by hand in seconds.

Gentle on Nonstick: This silicone spatula is the perfect partner for your favorite nonstick pan. Our silicone spatulas for cooking are great at saving food stuck in tight corners, all without scratching your nonstick surfaces.
description: Product Description What Makes Us Different Why Choose Our XiaoZu Spatulas Both the silicone handle and blade are high heat-resistant. You can rest assured you will never melt your favorite utensil again. Our BPA Free Food-Grade Non-Stick Silicone has the perfect balance of flexibility and rigidity to get the job done in the kitchen. Our foodl-grade silicone will not scratch your expensive non-stick and coated cookware The XiaoZu Spatulsaares easy to clean by hand and dishwasher safe.
